meaning: n.[希神,罗神]阿多尼斯(爱与美的女神Aphrodite所爱恋的美少年),美少年,小白脸
examples: Adonis was later killed by a wild boar – an attack that may have been arranged to avenge another of Adonis' romantic intrigues.
I went inside, waited 2 hours, then called Adonis.
Instead, Adonis - who lives in exile in France - bitterly disappointed many Syrians.
Adonis Karageorgis, a 35-year-old dental student, said he saw the sky light up from his apartment.
Lord Adonis said a combined authority should be set up no later than next April.
